name: Henry Butler
abstract: Henry Butler (September 21, 1948 – July 2, 2018) was an American jazz and blues pianist. He learned piano, drums, and saxophone in school.

concerts.label: Henry Butler, Piano, and Corey Harris, Guitar

about_quotes.speaker: Alvin Queen
about_quotes.evidence: Cyrus Chestnut couldn’t make it so we got Henry Butler on piano.
about_quotes.doc_title: Alvin Queen interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, August 23, 1997 [interview 1 of 2]
